query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A repeated, overlapping figure of a person in motion, arms extended outward, wearing a two-toned shirt with dark sleeves and a salmon-colored torso. Multiple translucent layers of the figure cascade across the frame in horizontal progression, creating rhythmic parallel streaks against a pale, warm-toned background. A bright circular light source appears behind the figure's head.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, intentionally blurred photograph showing repeated, overlapping exposures of a person in motion with arms extended outward, wearing a two-toned dark and salmon-colored shirt. Double-exposure layering creates translucent ghosted duplicates cascading horizontally across the frame with rhythmic parallel streaks, while intentional soft-focus and motion blur dissolve the figure into flowing, unrecognizable form against a pale warm background with a bright circular light source behind the subject's head.
